name: compliance catalog: financial-regulator subset includes ffiec-its, ffiec-cat, occ-heightened-standards, and sec-cyber-disclosure (§5 C-1)
command: j="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" && grep -qE '^- id: ffiec-its\s*$' "$j" && grep -qE '^- id: ffiec-cat\s*$' "$j" && grep -qE '^- id: occ-heightened-standards\s*$' "$j" && grep -qE '^- id: sec-cyber-disclosure\s*$' "$j" && echo ok 1>&2
